# Collingwood Stairlift

> Local sales, installation and service of straight and curved stairlifts and Quick Tub bathtub conversions in Collingwood and South Georgian Bay, Ontario, Canada. Operated by Silver Cross Grey Bruce. Free in-home assessments with a written quote. Phone: 519-904-4932. Email: wallace@collingwoodstairlift.ca.

## Pages

- [Home](https://collingwoodstairlift.ca/): Overview of stairlifts and bathtub conversions, common questions, and the booking form for a free in-home assessment.
- [Straight stairlifts](https://collingwoodstairlift.ca/straight-stairlifts): Lifts for single straight flights. Models: K2, K2 Plus, Handicare 1000 (outdoor package), Handicare 1100 (friction drive, folding track). Typically installed within days.
- [Curved stairlifts](https://collingwoodstairlift.ca/curved-stairlifts): Custom-bent rails for stairs with turns or landings. Models: Stairfriend 23, Handicare 4000, Freecurve (single-tube rail). Photo-measured to the exact staircase.
- [Bathtub conversions](https://collingwoodstairlift.ca/bathrooms): Quick Tub walk-thru insert (up to 12-inch lower step, 24-inch opening) and drop-in cap that restores a full bath. Sizes: Narrow, Wide, Xtra-Deep. Installed in about 2 hours.

## Facts

- Quotes are provided after a free in-home assessment; no pricing is published.
- Straight stairlift installs often take a few hours; curved rails are custom fabricated.
- Quick Tub cap seals watertight with a lifetime seal warranty; insert warranty 5 years.
- Service area: Collingwood, The Blue Mountains, Thornbury, Stayner, Creemore and the rest of South Georgian Bay.
